zh.lifeSummary: 當Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Athol於1290年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾阿爾時，他的父親Andrew de Atholia Fourth Laird of Glenerochie35歲，母親Agnes of Glentilt20歲。他於1268年之前與Lora Durward de Galloway在英國蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1306年登記服兵役。他去世於1355年在蘇格蘭培爾藍諾享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Athol于1290年出生在英国苏格兰培爾阿爾时，他的父亲Andrew de Atholia Fourth Laird of Glenerochie35岁，母亲Agnes of Glentilt20岁。他于1268年之前与Lora Durward de Galloway在英国苏格兰结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1306年登记服兵役。他去世于1355年在苏格兰培爾藍諾享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Donnachadh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

variants.name: Duncan
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

en.lifeSummary: When Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Athol was born in 1290, in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Andrew de Atholia Fourth Laird of Glenerochie, was 35 and his mother, Agnes of Glentilt, was 20. He married Lora Durward de Galloway before 1268, in Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He registered for military service in 1306. He died in 1355, in Rannoch, Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Athol est né en 1290, à Atholl, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Andrew de Atholia Fourth Laird of Glenerochie, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Agnes of Glentilt, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lora Durward de Galloway avant 1268, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1306. Il est décédé en 1355, à Rannoch, Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Athol 1290 in Atholl, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Andrew de Atholia Fourth Laird of Glenerochie 35 und seine Mutter Agnes of Glentilt 20. Er hat vor 1268 in Schottland, United Kingdom Lora Durward de Galloway geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er hat sich 1306 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1355 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Rannoch, Perthshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Athol è nato il nel 1290 nel Atholl, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Andrew de Atholia Fourth Laird of Glenerochie, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Agnes of Glentilt, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lora Durward de Galloway prima del 1268, nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1306. Morì nel 1355, nel Rannoch, Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Atholが1290年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアアソルで生まれた時，父Andrew de Atholia Fourth Laird of Glenerochieは35歳，母Agnes of Glentiltは20歳であった。1268年以前にイギリススコットランドでLora Durward de Gallowayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1306年に兵役登録をした。彼は1355年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアラノチで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Athol(이)가 1290년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 앳홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andrew de Atholia Fourth Laird of Glenerochie(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes of Glentilt(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1268년 이전 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Lora Durward de Galloway(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1306년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1355년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 랜옥h에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.from 23 June 1314 to 24 June 1314: de 23 de junho de 1314 a 24 de junho de 1314
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Athol nasceu em 1290, em Atholl, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Andrew de Atholia Fourth Laird of Glenerochie, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Agnes of Glentilt, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lora Durward de Galloway antes 1268, em Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1306. Ele faleceu em 1355, em Rannoch, Perthshire, Scotland, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Athol родился в 1290 г. в местности атолл, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Andrew de Atholia Fourth Laird of Glenerochie было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes of Glentilt, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lora Durward de Galloway перед 1268 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1306 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1355 г. в местности раннох, пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.from 23 June 1314 to 24 June 1314: desde 23 de junio de 1314 hasta 24 de junio de 1314
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Donnachadh Rearhair de Atholia 5th Laird Of Athol nació en 1290, en Atholl, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Andrew de Atholia Fourth Laird of Glenerochie, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Agnes of Glentilt, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lora Durward de Galloway antes de 1268, en Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1306. Murió en 1355, en Rannoch, Perthshire, Scotland, a la edad de 65 años.
